title: すぺしゃる☆でりしゃす！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out at lunch with Haru Urara...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! This Special★Delicious Burger sure looks
tasty!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Uuugh! It's not delicious at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After mistakenly eating one of her most hated
vegetables, Haru Urara's mood sours completely.
